name: Catarina Devon
description:
__Affiliations:__ Blackbeard Pirates; Impel Down (former)
__Height:__ 361 cm (11'10")
__Devil Fruit:__ ~! Inu Inu no Mi, Model: Kyubi no Kitsune (Dog-Dog Fruit, Model: Nine Tailed Fox)!~
__Devil Fruit Type:__ ~!Mythical Zoan!~

Crescent Moon Hunter Catarina Devon (カタリーナ・デボン, Katarīna Debon) is a member of the Blackbeard Pirates. She was the most dangerous female pirate ever to be imprisoned in Impel Down within the entire age of pirates. She was originally imprisoned in Level 6 of Impel Down, along with the other legendary criminals whose history were erased there. She was initially mentioned briefly by Emporio Ivankov.  ~!She is now taking part in the Whitebeard War alongside her new captain Blackbeard.!~
